name: com.gamedistrict.codeshield
description:
One package. Two tools. Ship cleaner games.

SOLID Review — scans C# scripts for SRP, OCP, LSP, ISP violations and generates AI-powered fixes via Claude Code CLI. Includes Word Doc export.

GD Checklist — full release checklist in one scan: SDK keys (AppLovin, Metica, Adjust, AppMetrica, Firebase, Ad Units), Pre-Release settings (app version, GraphicsAPI, Adjust environment, AppLovin flags, AppMetrica auto-collection), Build config (symbols, LZ4HC), and 20 manual device verification items with confirm buttons.

Open via Tools > GD CodeShield.

⚠️ AI-Powered: This tool uses AI to generate code suggestions. Results may contain errors — always review before applying.
